summary: Comprehensive testing of Invoice Generator app iteration 2 completed. All backend APIs (14/14 tests) and frontend UI flows tested successfully. Hardcoded company/bank details implementation verified in both backend PDF generation and frontend UI. PDF generation with embedded logo working correctly (853KB base64).

issues: Console warnings about deprecated 'shadow*' style props - should migrate to 'boxShadow' (React Native web compatibility warning, not critical)

test_categories.invoice_crud: ✓ All CRUD operations working (create, read, update, delete)
test_categories.pdf_generation: ✓ PDF generation working with embedded logo, returns 853,456 chars base64 (>500K requirement met)
test_categories.email_integration: ✓ Resend email integration working, sends invoice with PDF attachment
test_categories.validation: ✓ Proper 404 responses for nonexistent resources, 422 for validation errors

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Hardcoded company details properly implemented in backend (lines 25-33 in server.py)
✓ Hardcoded bank details properly implemented in backend (lines 30-32 in server.py)
✓ Frontend create.tsx has company banner (lines 96-99) - no company/bank forms
✓ Frontend preview.tsx has hardcoded COMPANY and BANK constants (lines 24-36) matching backend
✓ PDF generation uses hardcoded constants instead of invoice.company_details/bank_details
✓ All API endpoints use correct URL from environment variable (EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL)
✓ MongoDB _id properly excluded from API responses
✓ All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
✓ React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
✓ Totals calculation logic correct in both backend and frontend
✓ PDF generation working with reportlab and embedded logo
✓ Resend email integration properly configured and working
✓ Error handling present for API calls
✓ Proper use of async/await for API calls
seed_data_creation: Test invoice created during testing: TEST_UI_002. Four pre-existing invoices in database: TEST_UI_002, #445, TEST_UI_001, #001
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 focused on hardcoded company/bank details implementation. All changes verified successfully. Backend uses hardcoded constants for PDF generation. Frontend removed company/bank details forms and displays hardcoded values in preview. PDF generation returns 853KB base64 string with embedded logo. All functionality working as expected.

additional_notes.pdf_quality: ✓ PDF generation produces professional-looking invoices with proper formatting matching reference

known_limitations.resend_email: Resend API key is in test mode and can only send emails to verified address: lochandayanand05@gmail.com. To send to other recipients, domain verification is required at resend.com/domains. This is a Resend account limitation, not an app bug.
